tests.name: five-box-flow
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram showing 5 boxes in a horizontal flow: Browser -> Edge -> API -> Queue -> Database.

tests.name: decision-branch
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram: a Start box leads to a decision diamond 'Authorized?' which branches to an Allow box and a Deny box.

tests.name: three-tier
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram of a three-tier architecture: Presentation, Application, Data, stacked vertically with arrows top to bottom.

tests.name: labelled-pipeline
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram of an ETL pipeline: Extract -> Transform -> Load, each arrow labelled with the step verb.

tests.name: feedback-loop
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram with a Build box, a Measure box, and a Learn box arranged so arrows form a loop back to Build.

tests.name: single-callout
tests.prompt: Make an excalidraw diagram with one prominent box labelled 'Core Engine' and a short caption beneath it.
